title: bronwenia cornifolia var. maracaybensis
intro: Bronwenia cornifolia var. maracaybensis, also known as the Maracayben Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bronwenia cornifolia var. maracaybensis include its antimalarial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
